reason: Remediation involves deleting user accounts. If an unauthorized account is actually required for system or application functionality, removal could cause service disruption or loss of access, especially if the account is used for remote login (e.g., SSH). Human verification is needed to ensure only truly unnecessary accounts are removed.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; potential loss of required service accounts; possible removal of accounts used for remote access; impact on applications relying on specific local users
